server/tests/test_compare.py :: test_compare_identical_images
def test_compare_identical_images() -> None:
    raster = solid_raster(20, 16, 100, 120, 140)
    payload = png_bytes(raster)
    report = compare_images(payload, "a.png", payload, "b.png")
    assert report["identical_pixels"] is True
    assert report["mse"] == 0
    assert report["ssim"] == 1.0
    assert report["quality"] == "excellent"

server/tests/test_compare.py :: test_compare_different_sizes_aligns
def test_compare_different_sizes_aligns() -> None:
    left = solid_raster(24, 18, 200, 40, 40)
    right = solid_raster(12, 9, 200, 40, 40)
    report = compare_rasters(left, right)
    assert report["width"] == 12
    assert report["height"] == 9
    assert report["mse"] == 0

server/tests/test_compare.py :: test_compare_detects_compression_loss
def test_compare_detects_compression_loss() -> None:
    raster = gradient_raster(32, 24)
    source = png_bytes(raster)
    compressed = convert_raster(raster, OutputFormat("image/jpeg", "jpg"), max_mb=1)
    report = compare_images(source, "source.png", compressed, "compressed.jpg")
    assert report["mse"] > 0
    assert report["ssim"] < 1.0
    assert report["quality"] in {"excellent", "good", "fair", "poor"}

server/tests/test_compare.py :: test_compare_summary_present
def test_compare_summary_present() -> None:
    left = png_bytes(solid_raster(8, 8, 10, 20, 30))
    right = png_bytes(solid_raster(8, 8, 12, 22, 32))
    report = compare_images(left, "left.png", right, "right.png")
    assert "summary" in report
    assert "left.png" in str(report["summary"])
